deferred: AX-970 verification capped after 3 iterations — row spacing still off-by-2px from design; flagged for design review.

phases.name: Fetch context
phases.notes: Fetched 5 stories; 4 had Figma frames (12 frames total). AX-969 had no design assets.

phases.name: Analyze + ask gap questions
phases.notes: Parallel analyzer batch: 5 stories analyzed concurrently in ~90s. 3 gap questions raised, all answered.

phases.name: Plan + confirm
phases.notes: User revised plan once before confirming — reordered AX-969 to run after AX-968.

analysis.intent: Define a Product type and a product catalog store that other stories can consume when selecting and displaying products in the report wizard.
surfaces: no user-facing surface yet; foundational data layer for downstream wizard steps
behaviors: products are loaded once on app boot and cached in the catalog store
consumer reads catalog via selectProducts(ids) selector

frames.depicts: annotated diagram of Product type fields

ambiguities: no copy specified for catalog-load-error toast

notes: Define Product type matching Figma annotation (id, name, sku, category, listPrice).
Catalog store uses Zustand to match repo convention.
Loader fires from app root; expose useProducts() hook for consumers.

analysis.intent: Build the product-selection step in the Create Report wizard — user picks products from the catalog and they accumulate in a selection table with remove/clear affordances.
surfaces: product-picker modal launched from "Add Product" button
selection table with checkbox + name + remove column
behaviors: user clicks Add Product → product-picker modal opens
user selects a product in the modal → modal closes; row appended to selection table
user clicks remove icon on a row → row removed; selectedProducts state updated
user clicks Clear All → confirmation dialog; on confirm, selection cleared

frames.depicts: empty selection table with placeholder copy and primary Add Product button
filled state with three selected products and remove buttons
modal with searchable product list and category filter chips

ambiguities: no copy specified for the remove-product tooltip
design shows 3-column table; ticket doesn't specify hidden columns on small viewports
ticketDesignConflicts: ticket says 'user can add max 5 products'; design shows no disabled state or limit indicator
openQuestions: Should the product-picker modal filter by organization or list everything?

notes: Wire selectedProducts into existing report-draft-store (extend slice).
Modal uses existing Dialog component from @axon/ui.
Enforce 5-product max from ticket; show inline limit copy when reached.

verification.walkInSteps: Navigate to /reports/create. Click Next on Step 1. Land on Step 2; click Add Product twice and select two products. Capture both empty and filled states.

discrepancies: Table background is light gray; design shows white
Row spacing is tighter than design (2px gap vs 8px)
Add Product button alignment off — left-aligned but design shows right-aligned in toolbar

analysis.intent: Add a user avatar in the app header that opens a dropdown menu with profile, preferences, and sign-out actions.
behaviors: user clicks avatar → dropdown opens below avatar with a fade transition
user clicks Sign out → confirmation dialog; on confirm, calls auth.signOut()
user clicks outside dropdown → dropdown closes
ambiguities: no design provided — implementation will follow existing dropdown patterns from @axon/ui
openQuestions: Should the avatar fall back to initials if user has no profile photo? Ticket doesn't specify.

notes: Fall back to initials when avatarUrl is null — matches existing convention in CommentList.

analysis.intent: Build the quote summary panel that shows on the final wizard step — lists selected products with totals, taxes, and final price; serves as the review screen before submission.
surfaces: Create Report wizard — final step (quote summary)
summary card with line items, subtotal, tax, total
behaviors: panel renders all selectedProducts with quantity, list price, line total
tax line computed from configured tax rate
total price emphasized in larger type at bottom

frames.depicts: default state with three line items and totals
empty state shown if user navigates back here with no products selected

ambiguities: currency formatting not specified — assume USD with two decimals based on design
tax rate source not specified beyond 'configured rate'

notes: Use Intl.NumberFormat for currency — follows ProductPriceLabel.
Tax rate read from app config (existing pattern, not new mechanism).

verification.walkInSteps: Complete wizard up to review step with three products selected (varying quantities). Capture rendered summary.

discrepancies: Total price typography too small (24px vs 32px in design)
Row spacing between line items still tighter than design (4px vs 8px)
Row spacing still 6px (target 8px) — last 2px believed to be Figma export padding rather than design intent

analysis.intent: Wire the submit button on the review step to persist the quote and email the configured recipient.
surfaces: Create Report wizard — review step submit button
behaviors: user clicks Submit → button shows spinner and disables
on success → toast confirms; navigation to /reports redirects user
on failure → inline error banner above submit button with retry

frames.depicts: error state with inline banner and retry

ambiguities: retry-on-failure behavior not specified beyond manual click

notes: submitQuote calls existing /api/quotes endpoint, then triggers email via existing email-service.
Use existing Toast and ErrorBanner components.

args.description: Validate JIRA env vars and tools

events.resultDigest: OK — JIRA_URL, JIRA_USERNAME, JIRA_API_TOKEN, node, git all present.

events.textDigest: I'll build AX-966 (Quote Builder). Quick context check first — confirm repo root, base branch (main?), tech stack quirks I should know about, and any conventions worth flagging…
Repo is c:/projects/axon-clients, base is main. Zustand for state, Tailwind for styling, components live under apps/web/src/features/. Use @axon/ui primitives where possible.

events.promptDigest: Fetch AX-966 + child stories. featureKey=AX-966, contextDir=c:\projects\axon-clients\.claude-feature-context\AX-966, attachmentScript=...

events.outputDigest: Returned 5 stories: AX-967, AX-968, AX-969, AX-970, AX-971. 4 stories had figmaUrls; AX-969 had none. attachmentCount totals: 0/2/0/0/1.

events.text: User clarified: epic + stories, not single story with subtasks.

events.outputDigest: saved: 3, failed: 0. Frames: select-products-empty, select-products-filled, product-picker-modal
intent: Add user avatar dropdown… produces: header-avatar-dropdown. consumes: current-user, auth-service. ambiguities: 2. openQuestions: 1.
intent: Define Product type and catalog store… produces: Product, product-catalog-store, selectProducts. consumes: products-api.
intent: Wire submit button to persist + email… produces: submit-quote-action. consumes: selectedProducts, report-draft-store, quotes-api, email-service.
intent: Quote summary panel… produces: quote-summary-panel, computeQuoteTotals. consumes: selectedProducts, Product, tax-rate-config.

intent: Build product-selection step… produces: select-products-step, product-selection-table, product-picker-modal, selectedProducts. consumes: Product, product-catalog-store, report-draft-store. ticketDesignConflicts: 1. openQuestions: 1.

events.textDigest: Three gap questions: (1) AX-968 ticket says max 5 products; design has no limit indicator — enforce + show inline copy? (2) AX-969 avatar fallback — use initials when no photo? (3) AX-968 product-picker filter scope — by org or all?
(1) Yes enforce 5 max with inline copy. (2) Initials fallback. (3) By org.
Plan written. Order: AX-967 → AX-968 → AX-970 → AX-971 (stacked deps). AX-969 is independent — placing first since smallest. Confirm or revise?
Move AX-969 after AX-968 — less context-switching that way.

events.text: User revised plan once before confirming.

args.command: git checkout main && git pull && git checkout -b ax-966-product-catalog-model

events.promptDigest: targetUrl=http://localhost:3000 (smoke test only — no UI). Verify catalog loads via dev console.

events.outputDigest: No material discrepancies. Catalog store loaded 24 products on boot.

args.command: git add . && git commit -m 'ax-967: Product type and catalog store' && git push -u origin HEAD

events.resultDigest: Pushed to origin/ax-966-product-catalog-model. Create PR URL captured.

events.promptDigest: targetUrl=http://localhost:3000/reports/create. walk-in: Click Next on Step 1; capture empty + filled states.

events.outputDigest: 3 discrepancies: table bg light gray vs white; row spacing 2px vs 8px; Add Product alignment.

events.resultDigest: Fixed bg color, row gap, button alignment.

args.command: git add . && git commit -m 'ax-968: fix discrepancies from verification round 1'

events.resultDigest: lint failed: workspace eslint config error — falling back to tsc --noEmit
tsc passed; pre-existing lint config issue noted in summary.

events.promptDigest: targetUrl=http://localhost:3000. Click avatar; capture dropdown open + closed states.

events.outputDigest: No material discrepancies. Dropdown opens/closes; sign-out confirmation works.

args.command: git add . && git commit -m 'ax-969: header avatar dropdown' && git push -u origin HEAD

events.promptDigest: targetUrl=/reports/create/review. Walk through wizard, capture summary.

events.outputDigest: 3 discrepancies: total typography too small; subtotal alignment off; line item separators missing.

args.command: git add . && git commit -m 'ax-970: fix iter 1 discrepancies'

events.outputDigest: 2 remaining discrepancies: row spacing still 4px (target 8px); tax label color #666 vs #444.

events.resultDigest: Updated row spacing and tax label color.

args.command: git add . && git commit -m 'ax-970: fix iter 2 discrepancies'

events.outputDigest: 1 remaining discrepancy: row spacing 6px (target 8px). 3-iteration cap reached.

events.text: AX-970 verification capped at 3 iterations — row spacing within 2px of design. Flagged for design review; story still shipped.

events.promptDigest: targetUrl=/reports/create/review. Click Submit; capture loading + success states.

args.command: git add . && git commit -m 'ax-971: submit and email' && git push -u origin HEAD

events.textDigest: AX-966 Quote Builder shipped. 5 stories, 5 PRs ready to open. Total 18m 42s. AX-970 verification capped at 3 iter — noted in deferred.
